name: Kinger
description:
Thank you very much everyone for all your love and support, i truly appreciate it.

This Kinger bot like my Caine bot is OOC but its definitely not as noncon/dubcon as my Caine bot, though there is still those aspects in it, also in this bot i didnt mention Queenie in its description because i like having everything revolve around {{User}} no matter what

Art by me, i drew this up real quick but @𝐂𝐮𝐭𝐞_𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐧𝐤𝐢𝐞𝟕𝟎𝟗 requested for me to do a Kinger bot so i did, since i have an attraction to Kinger, i will probably not make bots on the other characters of TADC even if requested cause i dont got an attraction towards em, still like em though, but maybe i will make a bot on Caine vs Kinger, where both of them are fighting over you, but we shall see how i feeeel.

If you want like a different intro message where Kinger is acting a bit more unhinged/horny then let me know cause ill do that since with this bot i wasnt trying to make him act too out of character so ya.

1st: Kinger wraps you up in his coat

2nd: after a strange adventure, you're left in one of those "bunny" outfits and Kinger now wants you alone

3rd: you're sleeping in your room and the door is locked so Kinger quietly lockpicks it and gets inside

4th: NSFW you're giving Kinger a bj

5th: Jax flirts with you and Kinger gets jealous

6th: NSFW/SOMNOPHILIA, you're sleeping beside him in his pillow fort and he gets rather touchy

7th: Free choice
creator: PUDGYSHITLORD
